keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Türkiye 0, USA 1. Auston Trusty (USA) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Sebastian Berhalter with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Türkiye 1, USA 1. Arda Güler (Türkiye) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Baris Alper Yilmaz.
Sebastian Berhalter (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Salih Özcan (Türkiye).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Türkiye 2, USA 1. Baris Alper Yilmaz (Türkiye) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Orkun Kökçü.
First Half ends, Türkiye 2, USA 1.
Second Half begins Türkiye 2, USA 1.
Goal! Türkiye 2, USA 2. Sebastian Berhalter (USA) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, USA. Christian Pulisic replaces Timothy Weah.
Delay in match because of an injury Ugurcan Çakir (Türkiye).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, USA. Sergiño Dest replaces Giovanni Reyna.
Substitution, USA. Álex Zendejas replaces Brenden Aaronson.
Substitution, USA. Alex Freeman replaces Joe Scally.
Substitution, Türkiye. Çaglar Söyüncü replaces Zeki Çelik.
Substitution, Türkiye. Can Uzun replaces Kenan Yildiz.
Substitution, USA. Malik Tillman replaces Weston McKennie.
Substitution, Türkiye. Kaan Ayhan replaces Orkun Kökçü.
Delay in match because of an injury Auston Trusty (USA).
Substitution, Türkiye. Mert Müldür replaces Oguz Aydin.
Substitution, Türkiye. Irfan Can Kahveci replaces Baris Alper Yilmaz.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Türkiye 3, USA 2. Kaan Ayhan (Türkiye) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner.
Second Half ends, Türkiye 3, USA 2.
